testcase.name: Docker_with_Chrome

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url. Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-G86AH33L', ip: '10.221.135.113'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url.
